line_items.label: Cost of sales
line_items.source_location: Consolidated Profit and Loss Account, 31-Dec-24 column
line_items.validation_note: Turnover 340,931 less cost of sales 69,600 gives 271,331, but stated gross profit is 272,331, a discrepancy of 1,000. Stated gross profit reconciles with both the operating loss (272,331 less 677,908 equals the stated 405,577) and the stated 79.8% margin, so cost of sales appears misstated and should be 68,600. Value extracted as printed.

line_items.label: Retained Earnings
line_items.source_location: Consolidated Balance Sheet, Capital and Reserves, as at 31-Dec-25
line_items.validation_note: Retained earnings move from -865,681 at 30 June 2025 (per DOC-01) to +236,081, a positive swing of 1,101,762, despite a loss for the period of 485,144. Share premium falls 849,963 to 300,000 and share capital rises 144 to 25,000 over the same interval. Pattern is consistent with a capital reorganisation on re-registration as a PLC, but no note in this document explains it. Value extracted as printed.
